description_long: This is a rectangular, metal filing cabinet with a dark, matte finish, featuring clean, straight edges and a flat top surface. The cabinet appears to have a single, seamless front panel with a subtle horizontal line near the top, suggesting the presence of a single large drawer or compartment. There are no visible handles, label holders, or external hardware, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or openings. The overall construction suggests durability and security, suitable for storing documents or valuables. Its understated design would blend well in professional or utilitarian urban environments such as offices, garages, or storage rooms.
description: A dark, minimalist metal filing cabinet with a seamless front and flat top, lacking visible handles or label holders. Its sturdy, modern design is ideal for secure document storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, flat surface with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_1: Front view displaying a seamless panel with a faint horizontal line near the top, indicating a possible drawer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to the first side, with a plain, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: Rear view, also plain and featureless, matching the sides in appearance.
